name: Threshold Nine
specialty: Expert thieves specializing in retrieval of valuable artifacts and documents, known for their unparalleled stealth and ability to bypass any security system

members.name: Cadence Blackthorn
members.note: Cadence bears the telltale signs of a former member of the Argent Blades, a fact that creates tension among her current team

members.name: Elysia Ironwing
members.note: Elysia's eyes glow a soft blue in the dark, a result of her unique elven heritage and a trait that often helps the team navigate the treacherous Undercity

visual: Dressed in fitted, dark leather coats that blend seamlessly with the city's shadows, the pair carries a distinct air of professionalism and danger. Both women wear a single black feather in their hair, symbolizing their affiliation with the Glass Sigil
reputation_note: Threshold Nine is a name whispered in awe and fear among the Undercity's criminal underworld. They're not to be trifled with, and their services come at a high price
